eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 3:20 PM on JAN 23, 2019 Effective until 4:20 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the State of Nevada Emergency Operations Center with the JUNE TEST of the Nevada Statewide Emergency Alert System Broadcasters Cable Operators and the National Weather Service have set up the EAS as a way to keep you informed in the event of an emergency or disaster Using EAS Emergency Officials can instantly access local Radio Television and Cable Stations across the state to provide lifesaving information during floods fires hazardous materials spills or other emergencies Staying informed and safe is as easy as listening and watching your favorite local radio and television stations This concludes todays STATEWIDE test of the NEVADA Emergency Alert System
